description: Crafted from soft leather, this black wallet from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this stylish wallet has an embossed brand name on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 10.5 cm X 9 cm Leather for flexibility and durability Two compartments with fabric inner lining on the inside Multiple partitions inside to stash away cards and coins Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
